zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Tuttle於1634年12月16日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德時，他的父親William Tuttle26歲，母親Elizabeth26歲。他於1661年5月21日與Hannah Powell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1710年10月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年75歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文葛洛夫 史崔特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Tuttle于1634年12月16日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德时，他的父亲William Tuttle26岁，母亲Elizabeth26岁。他于1661年5月21日与Hannah Powell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1710年10月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年75岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文葛洛夫 史崔特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Tuttle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: possibly a variant of Thirkell, from the Middle English personal name T(h)irkill, T(h)urkill (Old Norse Thorkell, Thorkil, Thurkil, a shortened form of Thorketill from the god's name Thórr ‘Thor’ + ketill ‘kettle, cauldron’).

variants.name: Tuthill
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of Toothill, primarily a Yorkshire habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (Yorkshire) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancashire), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwickshire), and Tothill (Lincolnshire). There are several further minor placenames of this type that may have contributed to the surname. Also occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), which derives from the Old English personal name Totta (genitive Tottan) + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
New Haven County was created on 10 May 1666, and was named for an English port town called Newhaven, London, England

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.
New Haven is the home of Yale University. A  The city served as co-capital of Connecticut from 1701 until 1873, when sole governance was transferred to the more centrally located city of Hartford.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Tuttle was born on 16 December 1634, in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England, his father, William Tuttle, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 26. He married Hannah Powell on 21 May 1661, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 19 October 1710, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 75, and was buried in Grove Street Cemetery, New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Tuttle est né le 16 décembre 1634, à Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William Tuttle, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Powell le 21 mai 1661, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 19 octobre 1710, à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Grove Street Cemetery, New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Tuttle am 16. Dezember 1634 in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Tuttle 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 26. Er hat am 21. Mai 1661 in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Powell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Oktober 1710 im Alter von 75 Jahren in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Grove Street Cemetery, New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tuttle è nato il il 16 dicembre 1634 nel Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, William Tuttle, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Powell il 21 maggio 1661, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1710, nel New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Grove Street Cemetery, New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Tuttleが1634年12月16日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリングステアドで生まれた時，父William Tuttleは26歳，母Elizabethは26歳であった。1661年5月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンでHannah Powellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1710年10月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンで75歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニュー ヘイベングローブ ストレエト セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Tuttle(이)가 1634년 12월 16일 영국 노르섬프토실르 링스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Tuttle(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1661년 5월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 Hannah Powell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1710년 10월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴 하븐 그로브 스트릿 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tuttle nasceu em 16 de dezembro de 1634, em Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Tuttle, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Powell em 21 de maio de 1661, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1710, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Grove Street Cemetery, New Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Tuttle родился 16 декабря 1634 г. в местности рингстид, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Tuttle было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Powell 21 мая 1661 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 19 октября 1710 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности гров стрит кеметири, ню хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Tuttle nació el 16 de diciembre de 1634, en Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Tuttle, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hannah Powell el 21 de mayo de 1661, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1710, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Grove Street Cemetery, New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
